# AI Project Workflow Rules

Keep the slash command convention: `/init`, `/prd`, `/hld`, `/sdd`, `/impl`, `/review`, `/deploy`, and `/retro`.
Before acting, read `AGENTS.md`, `core/rules/`, the active Skill, and workflow state from the project root.
